prestazioni: Crankshaft reinforcement with a billet steel 4.0T C8 (DDH) stroker kit from VR Motors, increasing displacement to 4.2L while retaining the original CZGB 4.0L V8 TFSI engine block for a 700+ HP output with upgraded Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods

Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers (hybrid, 76mm compressor wheel) with custom BorgWarner EFR wastegates, Precision Turbo & Engine 1000cc injectors, and a Motec M150 ECU standalone management system for precise fuel and ignition mapping, paired with a CSF Racing dual-core intercooler and 3.5" titanium downpipes

KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers with remote reservoirs, custom valving for the C8 platform, and spherical top mounts from 034 Motorsport, combined with an Audi Sport-spec rear subframe reinforcement kit and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro for reduced deflection under 1,200 Nm torque loads
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using the Liberty Walk LB-WORKS RS6 Avant kit (C8-specific, bolt-on fenders with aggressive 50mm flares), paired with a custom Vorsteiner V-FF 107 carbon fiber front splitter and a 3-piece adjustable rear diffuser from RW Carbon

OEM+ carbon fiber mirror caps from 7Carbon, carbon fiber side skirts from Prior Design (PD-GTC8), and a custom Akrapović titanium exhaust system with quad 102mm carbon fiber tips, replacing the stock valved setup for a deeper, race-inspired tone

BBS FI-R 21x10.5" ET35 (front) and 21x12.5" ET45 (rear) forged wheels in a custom "Gunmetal with Brushed Face" finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/30 R21 front, 325/30 R21 rear), with a custom 5mm spacer setup from H&R to optimize track-width and stance
